headline: Robinhood’s Agentic AI And Trump Accounts Shift Growth And Risk Profile
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has rolled out agentic AI trading tools and AI-powered credit card features for retail customers. The new products allow users to delegate portfolio management and day to day spending decisions to AI agents with embedded safety controls. Robinhood has also partnered with the U.S. Treasury to launch federally seeded Trump Accounts, giving millions of children starter investment accounts. Robinhood built its business by giving retail investors low cost, app...
